item.title: word_count
item.description: Vault Stats This vault currently contains 14,607 words across all notes.

item.title: Posture
item.description: General You can severely limit your opponents effectiveness by turning their head in other direction.

item.title: Bridge
item.description: Motion where you are on your back and you elevate the waist towards ceiling. Used to get frames when bottom in Mount and Side control.

item.title: Gameplan
item.description: General Goal of this page is to outline a plan of what to do in different scenarios.

item.title: Passing
item.description: General Term used to refer to all forms of bypassing different types of guards Open guard Closed guard Half guard .

item.title: Crab ride
item.description: Description A position where you are sitting behind a standing opponent with your ankles hooking the opponent and preventing going forward.

item.title: Headquarters
item.description: Description A strange sitting position on opponents waist that prevents them effectively from moving their waist or legs.

item.title: Open guard
item.description: General Any general on the floor position where you have distance between you and your opponent should be improved immediately by either increasing the distance and getting to Standing or establishing at minimum some sort of open guard.

item.title: X guards
item.description: Description Quite vague concept having the legs form a “X” shape while controlling the opponents leg(s).
